Musk’s SpaceX adds billions in debt while cutting interest
topStories.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has successfully issued $25 billion in investment-grade bonds, a move that consolidates debt from X and xAI while lowering annual interest costs. topStories.title: ITAT: Accrued interest component on  non-convertible debentures sales is taxable as interest income
topStories.summary: The  ITAT has held that the accrued interest component embedded in sale proceeds from non-convertible debentures cannot automatically be treated as capital gains and may instead be taxed as interest income. Tax experts say the decision could trigger greater scrutiny and fresh litigation.

topStories.title: Gold futures sink to three-month low as dollar rally batters bullion
topStories.summary: India's gold prices hit a three-month low on Wednesday, dropping to Rs 1.44 lakh per 10 grams, as global markets react to a bolstered US dollar and expectations for elevated interest rates. Analysts attribute this slump to signals from the Federal Reserve and a notable downturn in technology stocks. Investors are now closely monitoring upcoming US inflation figures to gauge the next steps in the market.

india.title: UAE Central Bank fines foreign bank branch AED20 million over anti-money laundering failures
india.summary: A foreign bank's UAE branch has been hit with a hefty AED20 million fine by the Central Bank of the UAE. This action stems from serious and recurring lapses in the bank's anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing systems.  The bank's Head of Compliance also faces a AED300,000 penalty for failing to meet their duties, underscoring the regulator's commitment to financial system integrity.

india.title: ‘Suffered a heatstroke’: Italy rebuts Nato chief's claim on US flights supporting Iran strikes
india.summary: Italy has refuted Nato chief Mark Rutte's claim that hundreds of US aircraft flew from Italian bases for operations against Iran. Rome insists only technical and logistical support was authorized, not combat missions. This clarification follows Rutte's remarks to Fox News, which sparked political backlash in Italy. The government maintains its actions align with constitutional and treaty obligations, refusing requests beyond approved limits.

business.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
business.summary: Indian markets rallied on Wednesday, with Sensex and Nifty gaining up to 1% amid easing crude prices, supportive global cues and optimism over India-US trade talks. Analysts highlight key technical levels for Nifty, while stock-specific action was seen in banking, IT, infrastructure and midcap counters across NSE trading data.

business.title: Musk’s SpaceX adds billions in debt while cutting interest
business.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has successfully issued $25 billion in investment-grade bonds, a move that consolidates debt from X and xAI while lowering annual interest costs. This strategic financial maneuver leverages SpaceX's strong revenue streams from Starlink and government contracts to support the ambitious, cash-burning AI ventures.

business.title: BHIM Payments App transaction volumes more than triple in one year: NBSL Chief
business.summary: The monthly transaction volumes on the app increased from 79.64 million in June 2025 to 244 million transactions in May 2026, Lalitha Nataraj, MD & CEO, NBSL, said.

business.title: ITAT: Accrued interest component on  non-convertible debentures sales is taxable as interest income
business.summary: The  ITAT has held that the accrued interest component embedded in sale proceeds from non-convertible debentures cannot automatically be treated as capital gains and may instead be taxed as interest income. Tax experts say the decision could trigger greater scrutiny and fresh litigation.

business.title: Gold futures sink to three-month low as dollar rally batters bullion
business.summary: India's gold prices hit a three-month low on Wednesday, dropping to Rs 1.44 lakh per 10 grams, as global markets react to a bolstered US dollar and expectations for elevated interest rates. Analysts attribute this slump to signals from the Federal Reserve and a notable downturn in technology stocks. Investors are now closely monitoring upcoming US inflation figures to gauge the next steps in the market.

business.title: Industry leaders push for transparency, faster approvals in Tamil Nadu Industrial Policy 2026

business.title: Market trading guide: IndiGo among 2 stock recommendations for Thursday

business.title: Sebi introduces lighter certification framework for non-core staff in investment advisory roles
business.summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) has launched a new certification, 'NISM Series-XXV-B', specifically designed for investment advisory personnel focused on sales and client interaction. This initiative is intended to simplify operational processes for financial firms while maintaining compliance standards. However, professionals in primary advisory roles will still need to obtain 'NISM Series-X-A' and 'X-B' certifications, ensuring a comprehensive regulatory framework.

business.title: US stocks: JP Morgan raises S&P 500 year-end target to 7,800, joins bullish trend
business.summary: J.P. Morgan has elevated its forecast for the S&P 500 in 2026 to 7,800, driven by strong earnings from AI investments and a consistent economic environment. This optimistic prediction aligns with a recent trend of upgrades from various brokerages. Despite recognizing challenges such as increased stock issuance and stricter monetary policies, strategists maintain a positive view on earning growth, expecting substantial advancements until 2027.

business.title: Air India to make foreign travel more accessible to ‘Bharat’ : AI CEO

business.title: IRFC OFS subscribed over 1.5x by institutional investors; govt to exercise greenshoe option
business.summary: The government’s offer for sale in IRFC received a strong response from institutional investors, with the non-retail portion subscribed 1.86 times on Wednesday. Following the robust demand, the Centre will exercise the greenshoe option, allowing it to sell an additional 1% stake in the railway financing company through the OFS route.

business.title: Latest Boat Club deal values property at ₹27 crore a ground, including building

business.title: US Stocks Today | US stocks subdued as tech steadies, Micron earnings in focus
business.summary: Indian markets saw a subdued start on Wednesday, following two days of losses. Technology stocks showed signs of recovery after a significant downturn earlier in the week. Investors are now keenly awaiting the earnings report from chipmaker Micron, which is expected to provide further direction for the market. The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a slight dip, while the S&P 500 saw a marginal gain at the opening bell.

business.title: FundsIndia raises Rs 44.6 crore through maiden secured NCD issue
business.summary: FundsIndia has raised Rs 44.6 crore through its maiden private placement of secured non-convertible debentures, marking its entry into the corporate debt market. The proceeds will be used to strengthen its technology platform and expand investment offerings, as affluent investors increasingly seek fixed-income products for diversification amid evolving market conditions.

business.title: Brent crude falls 3%, drops below $75/bbl for first time since US-Iran war began
business.summary: Global oil prices tumbled as signs emerged of increased tanker activity in the Strait of Hormuz, potentially signaling Iran's return to the market. Analysts suggest this, coupled with eased hostilities and a U.S. sanctions waiver, is pressuring prices.  Despite encouraging signs, uncertainty lingers over the durability of U.S.-Iran nuclear talks, with some experts warning markets may be too optimistic.

business.title: Quote of the day by David Abrams: "There are good assets and bad assets but good prices and bad prices supersede whether the assets are good or bad"
business.summary: David Abrams stresses that investment outcomes depend more on entry price than asset quality. Even strong businesses can underperform if overvalued, while weaker ones can generate returns if bought cheaply. The insight reinforces core value investing principles of margin of safety, disciplined valuation, and avoiding momentum-driven buying.

business.title: India bonds gain, swap rates fall on dovish RBI comments, oil slide
business.summary: Indian government bonds enjoyed a remarkable climb on Wednesday, highlighted by the 10-year yield experiencing its most significant drop in a month. Fueling this surge was a recent comment from Reserve Bank of India Governor Sanjay Malhotra, who mentioned that contemplating interest rate hikes is premature. Additionally, decreasing oil prices contributed to positive market sentiment, driving yields down to three-month lows.
